query: ALTER TABLE opportunities MODIFY COLUMN funding ENUM('Fully funded', 'Partial', 'Stipend', 'Equity-based', 'Not certain') NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE opportunities ADD COLUMN fee ENUM('No-fee', 'Paid') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'No-fee';
